reasoning: One clear attribution violation (flagging quoted source text), plus use of non-standard/incorrect bias type labels. The promotional block is a valid bias instance but mislabeled. Possible structural slant was mishandled by quoting source text to justify it.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: The second item flags language clearly inside quotation marks and attributed to Allocco, violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Of two items, one (the quoted passage) is an invalid flag; the promotional block is a defensible bias instance.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: The model caught the obvious promotional bias but failed to cleanly identify any structural slant/omission without relying on quoted text.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Both labels used (“Promotional Bias,” “Selection Bias”) are not in the allowed set, making the type assignments clearly incorrect.
